PipeMaterial.description: The pipe material is the primary material that the pipe is composed of (copper, black steel, PEX) Material: Physical material to be used for Takeoffs and asigned to Physical elements. Material is capable of storing discipline specific data in Properties.

InsulationMaterial.description: The insulation is the layer of material outside of the pipe material, meant to insulate the internal conditions of the material being conveyed. Material: Physical material to be used for Takeoffs and asigned to Physical elements. Material is capable of storing discipline specific data in Properties.

SectionProfile.description: The section profile of the object that will determine its use within a System.

ElementSolidArea.description: This area takes the element's thickness into account to determine the actual area of the 'solid' portion of the element's composite ShapeProfiles.

ElementVoidArea.description: The interior area within the element's shapeProfile. This corresponds to the actual open area less any material thickness.

LiningSolidArea.description: The solid area of the lining within the element. This area takes into account the ElementSolidArea.

LiningVoidArea.description: The innermost, open area within the Element and its interior lining. This corresponds to the actual open area of the element.

InsulationSolidArea.description: The actual area of the exterior insulation material.

InsulationVoidArea.description: The interior area within the Insulation. This should correspond to the element's height and width properties.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
